nodes.name: Parse OpenAI Response and Prepare Action Items for Jira

additionalFields.description: =={{ "Owner: " + $('Loop Over Items').first().json.owner + "\nFrom meeting: " + $('Loop Over Items').first().json.meeting + "\nDue: " + ($('Loop Over Items').first().json.due_date ?? "Not specified") }}

options.jql: ={{ "project = \"" + $json.project + "\" AND summary ~ \"" + $json.description.substring(0, $json.description.lastIndexOf(' ', 50)) + "\" AND created >= -7d ORDER BY created DESC" }}

main.node: Parse OpenAI Response and Prepare Action Items for Jira
